title: pomaderris pilifera
intro: Pomaderris pilifera, also known as the prickly pomaderris or rough pomaderris, is a shrub native to eastern Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pomaderris pilifera include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Pomaderris pilifera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
